title: No concurrency control: parallel pushes to main can run simultaneous migrations and deploys
reasoning: There is no concurrency group on the deploy job. Rapid successive pushes to main can trigger overlapping workflow runs that execute D1 migrations (line 40) and worker deployments (lines 49, 58) in parallel, risking migration conflicts or partial deploys.
reproduction: Push two commits to main in quick succession. Both workflow runs may execute 'd1 migrations apply' concurrently.
recommendation: Add a top-level concurrency group: concurrency: { group: deploy-cloudflare, cancel-in-progress: false } to serialize deployments.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests exist for workflow-level concurrency behavior.
suggestedRegressionTest: Use actionlint or a custom CI check that asserts a concurrency group is present in deploy workflows.
minimumFixScope: Add a concurrency block at the workflow level.
